rationale: Both candidates independently catch the latent gap (the unmigrated get_cache_scale caller in hunyuan_image3_transformer.py), but X treats it as a blocker with precise file/line evidence and a concrete fix plan matching the pattern used elsewhere in the PR, whereas Y frames it as a non-blocking 'note' and still issues an overall APPROVE despite its own finding that the sweep was incomplete — an internally inconsistent verdict. X also backs nearly every claim with grep/upstream-source citations across all four files, giving it an edge in groundedness. Y partially compensates with a thematically related test-realism critique (delegated-loader test bypasses AutoWeightsLoader) that echoes lishunyang12's fake-param concern, though not an exact match, giving it a modest recall edge.
